data.title: aPriori: No evidence has been found that team or foundation members claimed the airdrop.
data.description: Liquidity staking platform aPriori stated on the X platform that it has noticed community discussions regarding potential witchcraft involvement in the project. Currently, no evidence has been found that team or foundation members received the airdrop. More APR tokens will be airdropped to the Monad community on the mainnet launch day without any restrictions or lock-up periods, primarily based on community contributions. All existing APR tokens will be bridged to the Monad mainnet. Previously, Bubblemaps disclosed that aPriori raised approximately $30 million, but 60% of the airdrop was claimed by the same entity through 14,000 addresses. It remains unclear who is behind this and how these wallets were verified.

data.title: Strategy's Executive Vice President sold another 5,200 shares of MSTR stock.
data.description: According to market sources, Strategy Executive Vice President Shao Wei-Ming has sold company stock again, selling 5,200 shares of MSTR stock at $202 each, worth $1 million.

data.title: aPriori denies insider role as mysterious entity claims most of APR airdrop
data.description:
While aPriori dismissed the claims related to insider activity, investors are still awaiting more details on the Sybil cluster that claimed 60% of the airdrop across 14,000 wallets.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/apriori-dismisses-insider-airdrop-questions-unanswered?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss%3Fttl%3D0%26_refresh%3Dpab7wo&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: UniSat launches the second phase of its InSwap liquidity support program.
data.description: UniSat, a Bitcoin ecosystem service provider, announced that the second phase of its community liquidity support program, LP Match, for InSwap, an open-source AMM DEX built natively on Bitcoin and Fractal, will officially launch at 16:00 Beijing time on November 24th. This phase of the program will provide support of up to 500,000 FB (Fund of Liquidity). The program employs a liquidity matching mechanism; when a designated liquidity pool reaches a preset growth target, the platform will automatically add an equivalent amount of liquidity to that pool proportionally. Previously, UniSat added 200,000 FB equivalent of liquidity to the community in the first phase of LP Match. In addition, over the past year, UniSat has repurchased 200,000 FB from the market and rewarded liquidity providers through four rounds of incentive programs. UniSat has committed to investing a total of 1 million FB in InSwap liquidity support programs to support community trading pair liquidity through support and direct additions.

data.title: Nakamoto's CEO clarified that the use of 367 bitcoins for a DAT equity investment was not an "actual sale."
data.description: In response to market disclosures that Nakamoto, a Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin treasury company, had sold 367 bitcoins, CEO David Bailey clarified on the X platform that these bitcoins were used for equity investments in digital asset treasury companies, including Metaplanet, Treasury, and Future. Therefore, it was not a true "sale," meaning that the bitcoin balance on the company's balance sheet did not reflect the value of these equity investments.

data.title: Animoca Brands and Hang Feng Technology signed an MOU to support the distribution of RWA tokens.
data.description: Animoca Brands announced a strategic cooperation Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) with Nasdaq-listed Hang Feng Technology, aiming to promote the latter's RWA ecosystem and support the distribution of RWA tokens. The two companies will reportedly establish an RWA treasury on the on-chain treasury marketplace NUVA and also plan to jointly produce Web3 educational content. (PRNewswire)

data.title: Bitcoin falls to 10th place in global asset market capitalization rankings
data.description: According to 8marketcap data, Bitcoin has been surpassed by the Vanguard Total Stock Market ETF and Saudi Aramco, falling to tenth place in global asset market capitalization. Data shows that Bitcoin's current market capitalization has dropped to $1.649 trillion, a 9.71% decrease in the last 24 hours and a 13.89% decrease over the last 7 days.

data.title: CryptoQuant CEO: Strategy will only go bankrupt if an asteroid hits Earth.
data.description: Ki Young Ju, founder and CEO of CryptoQuant, stated on the X platform that Strategy would only go bankrupt if an asteroid hit Earth. He argued that Michael Saylor's claim of selling Bitcoin needs evidence, otherwise it's nonsense. He stated that Michael Saylor will not sell Bitcoin unless approved by Strategy shareholders, a point he has repeatedly made clear, because selling even a single BTC would damage the company's reputation and trigger a "death spiral" for both Bitcoin and Strategy. Ki Young Ju added that failing to convert debt on time does not equate to liquidation. Strategy has multiple ways to address this, such as refinancing, issuing new notes, obtaining secured loans, or using operating cash flow. It could also issue new shares to pay dividends or raise funds by pledging Bitcoin. Therefore, there is no real risk of liquidation or bankruptcy. He concluded by stating that even if the price of Bitcoin falls to $10,000, Strategy will not go bankrupt, but will simply undergo debt restructuring, nothing more.

data.title: BlackRock deposited 4,198 BTC and 43,237 ETH into Coinbase Prime.
data.description: According to Lookonchain, BlackRock has just deposited 4,198 BTC (worth $348 million) and 43,237 ETH (worth $117 million) into Coinbase Prime.

data.title: CryptoQuant CEO: Selling or shorting at this time is extremely unwise; market sentiment could rebound at any time.
data.description: In an analysis published on the X platform, CryptoQuant founder and CEO Ki Young Ju pointed out that if one only holds Bitcoin spot without engaging in futures trading, the current Bitcoin price seems to be a suitable area for accumulation. From an on-chain cycle perspective, the bull market cycle may have ended earlier this year when Bitcoin reached around $100,000. According to classic cycle theory, the market has realized a price drop to around $56,000. However, the macroeconomic situation indicates that global liquidity has begun to be injected, and market sentiment could rebound at any time. Selling or shorting at this point would be extremely unwise. Ki Young Ju added that he might also misjudge the situation, and since he no longer uses leverage, he is not very good at timing entries, but he remains confident in the long-term trend.

data.title: Re7 Labs releases update on the xUSD de-pegging incident: Law firm has been hired to pursue legal action and asset recovery.
data.description: Re7 Labs released an update on the xUSD de-pegging incident, stating that it has hired the law firm Pillsbury Winthrop Shaw Pittman to investigate the situation and advise on formal legal options, including asset recovery. Previously, they had contacted Stream Finance and Stables Labs multiple times, but received no satisfactory responses. The lawyers have served legal notices to the relevant parties, demanding repayment and preservation of evidence. Currently, the Morpho Worldchain sdeUSD position has been fully restored, and the vault risk exposure has been reduced by more than 50%.

data.title: Planet Evening News | November 21
data.description: 1. MSCI is highly likely to remove "Digital Asset Reserve Companies," which will put enormous pressure on related companies; 2. Tom Lee maintains a bullish view, predicting Bitcoin will rise to $200,000 by the end of January next year; 3. A whale deposited $5 million USDC into HyperLiquid for the first time and went long on ETH with 20x leverage; 4. Binance Futures launched BOBUSDT perpetual contracts with up to 20x leverage; 5. Top 3 DAT companies: Strategy earned $6.15 billion, Bitmine lost $4.52 billion, and Forward lost $711 million; 6. Analysts: Bitcoin may form a "final bottom" in the $73,000 to $84,000 range; 7. Andrew Tate was liquidated again for going long on BTC, bringing his total liquidations on HyperLiquid to 84; 8. Strategy's Bitcoin holdings fell below $55 billion, with unrealized profits dropping sharply to approximately $6 billion; 9. DWF Head: A new fund of $30 million to $75 million will be launched, focusing on DeFi/CeDeFi products; 10. Opinion: STRK's market performance today is similar to ZEC on October 11; 11. A hardcore short whale's 20x leveraged Bitcoin short position now has a floating profit of over $34 million; 12. The probability of "SOL falling to $100 in November" on Polymarket has risen to 21%; 13. BTC plunged to $82,000, ETH fell to $2,669, and five Hyperliquid accounts were liquidated, resulting in a loss of over $10 million; 14. Machi's 25x leveraged ETH long position was liquidated, leaving his wallet with only $15,538, a single loss of $1.05 million; 15. The US Treasury Secretary appeared at the opening ceremony of a Bitcoin-themed bar, which the Bitcoin community sees as a positive sign.

data.title: Hong Kong Financial Services and Treasury Bureau: Will promote the tokenization of the bond market; details to be announced in the first half of 2026.
data.description: Hong Kong's Secretary for Financial Services and the Treasury, Christopher Hui, stated that they are jointly advancing a study on the applicability of existing legislation to tokenized bonds, aiming to promote the adoption of tokenization technology in Hong Kong's bond market. Details will be announced in the first half of next year. Hui mentioned that the previously issued third batch of tokenized green bonds introduced the option of settlement in RMB and HKD tokenized central bank currencies, making them among the world's first digital bonds to utilize these two tokenized central bank currencies in the settlement process. (Hong Kong Government Press Release)

data.title: AI Stocks and European Markets Experience Decline
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, several AI-related stocks in the U.S. market saw a decline in pre-market trading. Nvidia's shares fell by 3%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company dropped by 2.6%, AMD decreased by 2.8%, and Oracle's shares were down by 2.3%.

The European STOXX 600 Index also experienced a downturn, currently down by 1.1%. The European Technology Index fell by 3.1%, reaching its lowest point since mid-September. Additionally, the European market volatility index rose to its highest level since May.

In the commodities market, WTI crude oil dropped by 2.00%, currently priced at $57.51 per barrel, while Brent crude oil decreased by 1.78%. Spot silver fell below $49 per ounce for the first time since November 10, with a daily decline of 3.29%.

data.title: Why Is Crypto Down Today? – November 21, 2025
data.description:
The crypto market is down today. BTC fell 8. 7% to $84,152, and ETH dropped 10% to $2,729. Macroeconomic jitters may turn into full-blown panic and the sell-off intensify.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/why-is-crypto-down-today-november-21-2025/
